
# FetchMux

> Provider-neutral retrieval routing for AI agents, with inspectable policy decisions and route receipts.

FetchMux is machine-first and human-governed. The gateway is open source (Apache-2.0) and
self-hosted: operators run it themselves and provide their own upstream provider credentials (BYOK).
https://fetchmux.com publishes product information and machine-readable contracts; it does not host
a public API or remote MCP service. No upstream partnership or resale right is claimed.

## Source and self-hosting

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/krutftw/fetchmux): Gateway, TypeScript SDK, and read-only
  MCP server (`search_web`, `preview_search_route`), Apache-2.0.
- Quick start: clone, `npm clean-install`, `npm run build`, set a gateway key, `npm run dev:gateway`.
  A credential-free Crossref route allows a full trial without any provider account.

## Machine contracts

- [OpenAPI YAML](https://fetchmux.com/openapi.yaml): Canonical HTTP gateway contract.
- [OpenAPI JSON](https://fetchmux.com/openapi.json): JSON form derived from the canonical YAML.
- [Full product brief](https://fetchmux.com/llms-full.txt): Status, boundaries, and integration model.
- [Website](https://fetchmux.com/): Human-readable product and pilot information.
